principles.statement: Every section has exactly one visual focus point.
principles.verification: Count elements with typography.display or typography.headline per section. Must be exactly 1.

principles.statement: Primary CTA is always the most visually prominent interactive element.
principles.verification: button-filled or button-elevated must have higher visual weight than any other button on screen.

principles.statement: Spacing between sections uses spacing.lg or spacing.xl. Spacing between sibling elements uses spacing.md or spacing.sm. Never use intermediate or arbitrary values.
principles.verification: Check auto-layout spacing values against DS spacing scale. No hardcoded values.

principles.statement: Title text always precedes action elements. Actions never appear above their context.
principles.verification: In vertical auto-layout, heading nodes have lower index than interactive nodes.

principles.statement: Contrast and touch targets follow WCAG AA minimum. Text contrast ratio 4.5:1, touch target 48px minimum.
principles.verification: Computed contrast ratio >= 4.5. Interactive element min height/width >= 48.

principles.statement: No more than three typographic weights visible simultaneously in any section.
principles.verification: Count distinct font-weight values per section frame. Must be <= 3.

principles.statement: Visual hierarchy reads top-to-bottom, left-to-right. Primary content and actions are at natural scan entry points.
principles.verification: Highest-weight text is in top-left quadrant or centered-top of its container.

must_have: One dominant headline with clear value proposition
Supporting body copy or subheadline directly below the headline
Primary CTA placed after the copy
Substantial hero section height, not a thin strip
Clear visual hierarchy before secondary actions
should_have: Secondary CTA only if it supports the primary action
Optional media, illustration, product preview, or proof point area
Eyebrow/kicker text for context when useful
Desktop layout can use two columns; mobile stacks content vertically
avoid: Tiny button clusters without headline hierarchy
Hero content compressed into a short horizontal bar
More than two primary-looking actions
Generic placeholder copy when the prompt gives intent
hero.layout_hint: Full-width section with generous padding. Desktop default: 1440px frame, hero content width 960-1200px, section height 360-640px. Structure: optional eyebrow -> headline -> subcopy -> CTA row, plus optional visual/proof area.

must_have: Brand mark or logo in top section
Title describing the action (e.g., Sign in, Welcome back)
Email/username field
Password field with show/hide toggle
Primary CTA button (full-width on mobile)
Secondary action link (e.g., Forgot password)
should_have: Social login options below primary CTA
avoid: More than 2 visible input fields before scroll
CTA above input fields
Password recovery link above the form
Multiple competing primary buttons
Decorative elements that distract from the form
login.layout_hint: Centered single-column, max-width 400px on desktop, full-width on mobile. Vertical rhythm: logo -> title -> form -> CTA -> secondary links.

must_have: Clear page title
Consistent list item structure (all items same anatomy)
Visual separator between items (divider or spacing, not both)
Empty state for zero items
should_have: Search or filter mechanism if > 7 items expected
avoid: Inconsistent item heights
More than 3 actions visible per item
Mixing card and list layouts in same view
list.layout_hint: Full-width list items. Fixed header with title + actions. Scrollable content area.

must_have: Clear form title describing purpose
Labeled input fields (label above, not placeholder-only)
Primary submit CTA at form end
Error state indication per field
Required field indicators
should_have: Logical field grouping with section headers
avoid: Placeholder text as the only label
Submit button above form fields
More than 7 visible fields without grouping
Side-by-side fields on mobile
Disabled submit button without explanation
form.layout_hint: Single column on mobile. Two columns on desktop only for short related fields (first+last name). CTA group always at bottom.

must_have: Illustration or icon (not just text)
Clear message explaining what is empty and why
Primary action to resolve the empty state
avoid: Generic text like Just empty or Nothing here
Multiple competing CTAs
Blame language (You have not done X yet)
empty_state.layout_hint: Vertically centered in available space. Icon/illustration -> text -> CTA. Max-width 320px.

must_have: Page title
Grouped settings with section headers
Consistent control placement (toggles right-aligned, inputs full-width)
Save/apply action
should_have: Destructive actions visually separated (e.g., Delete account at bottom, red)
avoid: Flat list without grouping
Toggle AND save button for same setting (pick one pattern)
Critical actions mixed with routine settings
settings.layout_hint: Full-width sections. Each section: header -> list of setting rows. Destructive zone at bottom with extra spacing.

must_have: Summary metrics in top section (max 4 KPI cards)
Clear page title or greeting
Primary content area below metrics
Consistent card structure for data blocks
avoid: More than 4 metric cards in top row
Charts without labels or legends
Mixing too many data visualization types
Scrolling before seeing any data
dashboard.layout_hint: Metric cards in horizontal row (2-4). Content grid below: 2 columns on desktop, single on mobile. Cards with consistent padding and corner radius.

must_have: Back navigation
Clear item title
Primary content section
Action buttons contextual to the item
avoid: Actions before content
Overloaded toolbar (max 3 visible actions, rest in overflow)
Tabs with only 1 or 2 items
detail.layout_hint: Header with back + title + actions. Scrollable content body. Sticky action bar at bottom on mobile.

must_have: Error icon or illustration
Clear error message in plain language
Recovery action (retry, go back, go home)
should_have: Error code or reference for support
avoid: Technical jargon (500 Internal Server Error)
Dead ends with no action
Blaming the user
error.layout_hint: Vertically centered. Icon -> message -> actions. Same pattern as empty state but with error color tokens.

roles.label: typography.label-large or typography.label-medium. Used for button text, form labels, navigation items.
roles.body: typography.body-large or typography.body-medium. Used for paragraph text, descriptions, helper text.
roles.title: typography.title-large or typography.headline-small. Used for section headers, card titles.
roles.headline: typography.headline-medium or typography.headline-large. Used for page titles, hero text.
roles.accent: color.primary or color.tertiary. Used for interactive elements, emphasis, brand moments.
roles.surface: color.surface or color.surface-variant. Used for backgrounds, cards, containers.
roles.on-surface: color.on-surface or color.on-surface-variant. Used for text and icons on surface backgrounds.

spacing_intent.tight: spacing.4 or spacing.8. Between related inline elements (icon and label, badge and text).
spacing_intent.compact: spacing.8 or spacing.12. Between sibling elements in a group (list items, form fields).
spacing_intent.comfortable: spacing.16 or spacing.24. Between distinct groups within a section.
spacing_intent.spacious: spacing.24 or spacing.32. Between sections or major content blocks.
spacing_intent.generous: spacing.32 or spacing.48. Between top-level page regions (header, body, footer).

ds_glossary.reading_order: Top to bottom, left to right. Primary content and actions at natural scan entry points. F-pattern for content-heavy screens, Z-pattern for landing/marketing.

recurring_patterns.description: Clean top bar with back action, centered title, and optional trailing action.
recurring_patterns.structure: FRAME(horizontal) -> [icon-button(back), text(title, centered, flex-grow), icon-button(action, optional)]
recurring_patterns.spacing: spacing.16 horizontal padding, spacing.8 between elements

recurring_patterns.description: Sticky footer with primary CTA and optional secondary link below.
recurring_patterns.spacing: spacing.16 padding all sides, spacing.8 between buttons
recurring_patterns.position: Always at bottom of screen, above safe area

recurring_patterns.description: A text link or text-button placed directly below the primary action button for alternative flows.
recurring_patterns.structure: text-button or link, centered, below primary CTA with spacing.8 gap
recurring_patterns.use_case: Forgot password below Sign in, Skip below Continue, Terms link below Submit

recurring_patterns.description: Horizontal row of 2-4 KPI cards with equal width, used at top of dashboards.
recurring_patterns.spacing: spacing.16 gap between cards, each card has spacing.16 internal padding
recurring_patterns.constraints: Min 2, max 4 cards. Stack vertically on mobile.

recurring_patterns.description: Vertical stack of labeled input fields with consistent spacing.
recurring_patterns.spacing: spacing.16 between fields, spacing.24 before section header
recurring_patterns.constraints: Max 5 fields per group before adding a new section header.

recurring_patterns.description: Standard card with image/icon top, title, description, and optional actions.
recurring_patterns.structure: FRAME(vertical) -> [image/icon(optional), text(title), text(description), FRAME(horizontal, actions, optional)]
recurring_patterns.spacing: spacing.16 internal padding, spacing.8 between text elements, spacing.16 before actions

recurring_patterns.description: Centered block for empty or error states.
recurring_patterns.spacing: spacing.16 between elements, max-width 320px, vertically centered in parent

too_many_equal_weights.translation: Multiple text elements have the same visual prominence
too_many_equal_weights.corrective_action: Reduce typographic scale: keep 1 headline, demote others to body or label

cta_buried.translation: Primary button does not stand out from surrounding elements
cta_buried.corrective_action: Upgrade CTA to filled variant, increase size, add spacing above/below, reduce competing elements

hierarchy_inverted.translation: Secondary content has more visual weight than primary content
hierarchy_inverted.corrective_action: Swap typography scales: title gets headline token, description gets body token

too_cluttered.translation: Too many elements competing for attention in the viewport
too_cluttered.corrective_action: Increase spacing between groups, remove or collapse non-essential elements, add section breaks

feels_generic.translation: Layout and component choices are predictable and uninspired
feels_generic.corrective_action: Apply Variability Engine with higher creativity seed, try alternative layout pattern from recurring_patterns

spacing_inconsistent.translation: Auto-layout gaps do not follow the DS spacing scale
spacing_inconsistent.corrective_action: Audit all spacing values, replace with nearest DS scale token, apply spacing_intent from glossary

feedback_phrases: that button type doesnt fit here
wrong_component.translation: A component variant is used in a context where another variant is more appropriate
wrong_component.corrective_action: Consult component description and rules.json for correct variant-context mapping

feedback_phrases: eye doesnt know where to go
reading_order_wrong.translation: Visual scan does not follow natural reading flow
reading_order_wrong.corrective_action: Rearrange elements per reading_order in glossary: primary content at scan entry point

not_enough_breathing_room.translation: Content feels compressed, no white space
not_enough_breathing_room.corrective_action: Upgrade spacing from compact to comfortable or spacious per glossary mapping

actions_before_content.translation: Buttons or interactive elements appear above the content they act on
actions_before_content.corrective_action: Move action elements below their related content, apply Principle P-004
